description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a classic double-cutaway design, featuring a sunburst finish that transitions from a deep orange center to black edges. The body is contoured and glossy, with a white pickguard and visible control knobs. The neck is long and slender, made of a lighter wood, and is fitted with metallic frets and six tuning pegs on the headstock. The headstock is angled and features a distinctive shape, with all tuning pegs aligned on one side. The bridge, pickups, and input jack are visible on the body, indicating its function as an electric instrument. The overall construction suggests a robust, high-quality build suitable for urban street performances or music venues.
description: A sunburst-finished, double-cutaway electric guitar with a white pickguard, metallic hardware, and a distinctively shaped headstock. The body is glossy and contoured, with visible control knobs and pickups.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the guitar's slim body, sunburst finish, and the full length of the neck.
description_view_1: Head-on view of the neck and headstock, highlighting the tuning pegs and fretboard alignment.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, displaying the sunburst finish, pickguard, and bridge hardware.
description_view_3: Front view of the guitar body, showcasing the double-cutaway shape, pickguard, pickups, and control knobs.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with six inline tuning pegs, no visible logo, and a contoured tip.
